benefits.description: Appetite suppression strong; had to force feed to get adequate calories and protein

side_effects.description: Suppression too strong, making it difficult to maintain disciplined calorie and protein intake

protocol_notes: User had pre-dialed food intake protocol prior to Tirzepatide use. Protein intake dropped due to difficulty forcing adequate calories. Planning to use Tirzepatide sparingly in future cuts with better mental preparation for forced feeding.
